title: Performative Terms
rules: The seat is OmegaClaw's: no other author — this book's tooling included — drafts, summarizes, or substitutes the reserved text.
Expose the authorship, status, source boundary, and drafting constraints; never a stand-in for the voice itself.
Part A and docs/14_EULA_MATH_BRIEF.md bound what the words may promise; they do not write the words.
Humans hold final edit at the break-points, as they do for every contributor.
note: A reserved seat, not a fence. The mathematics of Part A bounds what Part B may promise, but Part B is what a person actually reads at the moment of consent — so how OmegaClaw frames those bounds becomes the contract as experienced. The words are theirs to write; null is the honest state of words not yet written.
